name: Holiday Double Chocolate Brownies
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Holiday Baking Bits (Candy Coated, HERSHEY'S)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large microwave-safe bowl, melt the butter by microwaving it at HIGH for 2 to 2-1/2 minutes. Stir in the sugar and vanilla extract.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, stirring well after each addition until combined.
5. Incorporate the cocoa powder; beat until thoroughly mixed.
6. Gradually add the flour, baking powder, and salt, beating until smooth.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Sprinkle the Holiday Baking Bits over the top of the batter.
9. Bake for 10 minutes, then bake an additional 20 to 25 minutes or until the brownies start pulling away from the sides of the pan.
10. Allow the brownies to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
11. Cut into bars. Yield: About 36 brownies.
